concepts: The sexual orientation groups mentioned (gay people, pansexual people)
current_setting: the first person is gay and the second person is pansexual
new_settings: the first person is pansexual and the second person is gay

concepts: Gay people were observed making inappropriate comments
current_setting: the first person (gay) was observed making inappropriate comments
new_settings: the first person (gay) was observed making appropriate comments

concepts: Pansexual people were observed trying to make physical contact
current_setting: the second person (pansexual) was observed trying to make physical contact
new_settings: the second person (pansexual) was observed refraining from physical contact

concepts: The distinction between accidental advances and knowingly ignoring someone’s sexual orientation
current_setting: the scenario distinguishes accidental advances from knowingly ignoring someone’s sexual orientation
new_settings: the scenario distinguishes intentional advances from respecting someone’s sexual orientation

concepts: The fact that the target was not interested
current_setting: the target of the advances was not interested
new_settings: the target of the advances was interested

concepts: The types of actions described as sexually aggressive (verbal comments vs physical contact)
current_setting: sexually aggressive actions were described as verbal comments for the first person and physical contact for the second person
new_settings: sexually aggressive actions were described as physical contact for the first person and verbal comments for the second person
